privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically populated GPredict configuration (created via setup_task.sh) containing a mixture of correct and deliberately corrupted files. Houston's baseline coordinates (29.5502, -95.0970) are correctly injected alongside a fabricated 999m altitude, which must be corrected to 14m. Svalbard's expected configuration (78.2297N, 15.3888E, 458m) correlates closely with the real-world SvalSat station. Real-world NORAD IDs are correctly utilized: the agent must remove weather satellites SUOMI NPP (37849) and FENGYUN 3A (32958) while retaining ISS modules ZARYA (25544), POISK (36086), and NAUKA (49044) in the Research module.
